sync_type: Custom integration (no native connector) — via API, Zapier, Make, or n8n
popularity: medium_growing — ActiveCampaign is the fastest-growing marketing automation platform

authentication_requirements.hubspot_side: OAuth 2.0 or Private App Token with CRM scopes (contacts, deals).
authentication_requirements.activecampaign_side: API Token (Api-Token header) from Developer settings. Recommend dedicated service account.

common_use_cases: Sync HubSpot contacts to ActiveCampaign for advanced email automation sequences
Tag contacts in ActiveCampaign based on HubSpot lifecycle stage changes
Create ActiveCampaign deals from HubSpot deal stage updates
Trigger ActiveCampaign automations from HubSpot custom events

hubspot_endpoints.purpose: Read deal stages for automation triggers

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: POST /api/3/contactTags expects {"contactTag":{"contact":"1","tag":"2"}} but many developers send {"contact":"1","tag":"2"} based on reading API docs
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Always wrap resource data in the resource name key. Use {"contactTag":{"contact":id,"tag":id}} for contact tags. Similarly, {"contact":{...}} for contacts. Read the raw JSON schema not just the parameter list

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: API key tied to individual user
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign only supports API key auth (no OAuth). Each key belongs to a user. If the user leaves or is deactivated, the integration breaks silently.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Create a dedicated API service user account (not a real person). Document which integrations use which API key. Regularly audit API key ownership

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: API key was reset from Developer settings but integration still uses old key. Python library crashes with KeyError on content-type header.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Implement proper HTTP error handling in integration code. Check response.status_code before parsing body. Update stored API key immediately after reset

community_solutions.problem: ActiveCampaign doesn't return proper JSON on 403 error — causes library crash
community_solutions.solution: Wrap API calls in try/except. Check response.status_code before accessing headers or body. Use a middleware integration layer (n8n, Make) instead of direct client library.

community_solutions.problem: No native connector — requires custom build or middleware
community_solutions.solution: Use Make (Integromat) or n8n for visual workflow builder. ActiveCampaign and HubSpot both have well-supported modules on these platforms. Avoid building from scratch unless you need custom transformations.
